steps.title: Spot the explanatory relationship
steps.content: The first sentence establishes that poisonous amphibians migrate during the day, unlike most animals. The second sentence explains how they manage this safely: their warning colors deter daytime predators. The transition must connect an established behavior to its protective mechanism.

steps.title: Match the transition to the logic
steps.content:
”At that time” correctly introduces the temporal setting (daytime) and sets up the explanation of how warning colors provide protection during migration. The other three either suggest an example (“For example”), paraphrase the first sentence (“In other words”), or introduce contrast (“However”) where the actual relationship is explanatory elaboration.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
